'''''Luudrian Star''''' was a modified [[Ghtroc Industries/Legends|Ghtroc]] [[720 light freighter/Legends|720 light freighter]] owned by [[Tru'eb Cholakk]], [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] gunrunner. Tru'eb was able to buy the ship with the reward he got from [[Platt Okeefe/Legends|Platt Okeefe]] after freeing her from the [[Slavery/Legends|slaver]] [[Quintik Kahr|Big Quince]].

{{Ship-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
In the Adventure Journal 2, the ''Luudrian Star'' is mistakenly identified as a Ghtroc Class 729 freighter.
